economic_notes: First Nation has economic development through Quatsino Economic Development Limited Partnership (99.9%), Quatsino Forestry Limited Partnership (99.9%), Quatsino First Nation Economic Development Corporation Ltd., Quatsino Forestry General Partner Ltd., and Gilakasla Kwa Holdings Ltd. (33%). QEDLP owns investments in Quatsino Marine Limited Partnership, Quattishe Limited Partnership and Quatern Limited Partnership. Cash distribution from First Nation partnership of $1,200,000 received in 2024. Forestry revenue of $1,748,251. Wind Farm revenue of $326,975. Gaming revenue of $493,975.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to unrecognized Asset Retirement Obligations (PS 3280) — First Nation has not identified ARO liabilities and is in consultation with ISC regarding legal obligations for federally funded assets. This qualification also applies to prior years 2023 and 2022. Auditor firm name not clearly identified; address is Suite 400 - 345 Wallace Street, Nanaimo BC. Consolidated entities include CMHC Housing, 1279195 Limited Partnership, and 1279195 BC Ltd. Five GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Transfer to Nation members of $1,231,150 and transfer to Nation business entity of $992,700 made during the year. New PS 3400 Revenue standard adopted April 1, 2023 prospectively with no material impact. Cash distribution from First Nation partnership (QEDLP) of $1,200,000 received. Province of BC accounts receivable increased significantly from $8,624 to $1,130,967.
